-- ========================================================================

-- Source : 'None' ! None

-- Filters: ['Month=2025-07-01T00:00:00', 'Active Route Status(all)', 'operation(all)']

DEFINE

    -- ── Value field 1: OUTLETS
    --    Aggregation : COUNT
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: storeCode
    VAR _V1_OUTLETS = CALCULATE(
        COUNTA('Sales Data Dump'[storeCode]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00"
    )

    -- ── Value field 2: VISITS
    --    Aggregation : SUM

    VAR _V3_VISIT_FREQ_DAYS = CALCULATE(

-- ========================================================================
-- PIVOT  : SALES STATUS blocks  [PT_SALES_STATUS_blocks_2]
-- Sheet  : SALES STATUS blocks   Location: A7:Z13
-- Source : 'None' ! None
-- Rows   : ['region', 'areaType', 'Customer Active Status', 'routeDescription', 'storeName']
-- Columns: []
-- Filters: ['OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS=0.0', 'Active Route Status(all)', 'operation(all)']
-- Values : ['OUTLETS', 'VISITS', 'VISIT FREQ DAYS', 'LAST VISIT DAYS', ' LAST ORDER DAYS ', 'ORDER FREQ', 'RGB ', 'PET ', 'TOTAL ORDER', 'SALE COUNT', 'LAST SALE DAYS', 'DROP       SIZE', 'FREQ DAYS', 'RGB', 'PET', 'TOTAL    SALE', '  OTIF %', ' RGB  % CONTR', ' TIER 1 ', '  TIER 2 ', ' OB ', 'TIER 1', 'TIER 2', 'OB', ' ND %']
--
-- Calculated Fields (Excel formula → DAX translation):
--   Excel :   OTIF % = totalDeliveredQty/totalOrderQty
--   DAX   : 'Sales Data Dump'[totalDeliveredQty]/'Sales Data Dump'[totalOrderQty]
--   Excel :  RGB  % CONTR = rgbDeliveredQty/totalDeliveredQty
--   DAX   : 'Sales Data Dump'[rgbDeliveredQty]/'Sales Data Dump'[totalDeliveredQty]
-- ========================================================================

DEFINE

    -- ── Value field 1: OUTLETS
    --    Aggregation : COUNT
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: storeCode
    VAR _V1_OUTLETS = CALCULATE(
        COUNTA('Sales Data Dump'[storeCode]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0
    )

    -- ── Value field 2: VISITS
    --    Aggregation : SUM
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: mdrDscrVisits

        SUM('Sales Data Dump'[mdrDscrVisits]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0

    --    Aggregation : AVERAGE
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: avgVisitFrequency
    VAR _V3_VISIT_FREQ_DAYS = CALCULATE(
        AVERAGE('Sales Data Dump'[avgVisitFrequency]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0
    )

    -- ── Value field 4: LAST VISIT DAYS
    --    Aggregation : AVERAGE
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: daysSinceLastVisit
    VAR _V4_LAST_VISIT_DAYS = CALCULATE(
        AVERAGE('Sales Data Dump'[daysSinceLastVisit]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0
    )

    -- ── Value field 5:  LAST ORDER DAYS 
    --    Aggregation : AVERAGE
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: daysSinceLastOrder
    VAR _V5__LAST_ORDER_DAYS_ = CALCULATE(
        AVERAGE('Sales Data Dump'[daysSinceLastOrder]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0
    )

    -- ── Value field 6: ORDER FREQ
    --    Aggregation : AVERAGE
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: avgOrderFrequency
    VAR _V6_ORDER_FREQ = CALCULATE(
        AVERAGE('Sales Data Dump'[avgOrderFrequency]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0
    )

    -- ── Value field 7: RGB 
    --    Aggregation : SUM
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: rgbOrderQty
    VAR _V7_RGB_ = CALCULATE(
        SUM('Sales Data Dump'[rgbOrderQty]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0
    )

    -- ── Value field 8: PET 
    --    Aggregation : SUM
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: petOrderQty
    VAR _V8_PET_ = CALCULATE(
        SUM('Sales Data Dump'[petOrderQty]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0
    )

    -- ── Value field 9: TOTAL ORDER
    --    Aggregation : SUM
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: totalOrderQty
    VAR _V9_TOTAL_ORDER = CALCULATE(
        SUM('Sales Data Dump'[totalOrderQty]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0
    )

    -- ── Value field 10: SALE COUNT
    --    Aggregation : SUM
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: deliveryCount
    VAR _V10_SALE_COUNT = CALCULATE(
        SUM('Sales Data Dump'[deliveryCount]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0
    )

    -- ── Value field 11: LAST SALE DAYS
    --    Aggregation : AVERAGE
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value

-- ========================================================================
-- PIVOT  : Presale Grade Block  [PT_Presale_Grade_Block_4]
-- Sheet  : Presale Grade Block   Location: A7:Z92
-- Source : 'None' ! None
-- Rows   : ['region', 'areaType', 'block', 'Customer Grade Categorization', 'routeDescription', 'storeName']
-- Columns: []
-- Filters: ['Month=2025-07-01T00:00:00', 'OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS(all)', 'Active Route Status(all)', 'operation(all)']
-- Values : ['OUTLETS', 'VISITS', 'VISIT FREQ DAYS', 'LAST VISIT DAYS', ' LAST ORDER DAYS ', 'ORDER FREQ', 'RGB ', 'PET ', 'TOTAL ORDER', 'SALE COUNT', 'LAST SALE DAYS', 'DROP       SIZE', 'FREQ DAYS', 'RGB', 'PET', 'TOTAL    SALE', '  OTIF %', ' RGB Contr. % ', ' TIER 1 ', '  TIER 2 ', ' OB ', 'TIER 1', 'TIER 2', 'OB', ' ND %']
--
-- Calculated Fields (Excel formula → DAX translation):
--   Excel :   OTIF % = totalDeliveredQty/totalOrderQty
--   DAX   : 'Sales Data Dump'[totalDeliveredQty]/'Sales Data Dump'[totalOrderQty]
--   Excel :  RGB Contr. %  = rgbDeliveredQty/totalDeliveredQty
--   DAX   : 'Sales Data Dump'[rgbDeliveredQty]/'Sales Data Dump'[totalDeliveredQty]
-- ========================================================================

DEFINE

    -- ── Value field 1: OUTLETS
    --    Aggregation : COUNT
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: storeCode
    VAR _V1_OUTLETS = CALCULATE(
        COUNTA('Sales Data Dump'[storeCode]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00"
    )

    -- ── Value field 2: VISITS
    --    Aggregation : SUM
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: mdrDscrVisits
    VAR _V2_VISITS = CALCULATE(
        SUM('Sales Data Dump'[mdrDscrVisits]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00"
    )

    -- ── Value field 3: VISIT FREQ DAYS
    --    Aggregation : AVERAGE
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: avgVisitFrequency
    VAR _V3_VISIT_FREQ_DAYS = CALCULATE(
        AVERAGE('Sales Data Dump'[avgVisitFrequency]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00"
    )

    -- ── Value field 4: LAST VISIT DAYS
    --    Aggregation : AVERAGE
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: daysSinceLastVisit
    VAR _V4_LAST_VISIT_DAYS = CALCULATE(
        AVERAGE('Sales Data Dump'[daysSinceLastVisit]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00"
    )

    -- ── Value field 5:  LAST ORDER DAYS 
    --    Aggregation : AVERAGE
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: daysSinceLastOrder
    VAR _V5__LAST_ORDER_DAYS_ = CALCULATE(
        AVERAGE('Sales Data Dump'[daysSinceLastOrder]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00"
    )

    -- ── Value field 6: ORDER FREQ
    --    Aggregation : AVERAGE
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: avgOrderFrequency
    VAR _V6_ORDER_FREQ = CALCULATE(
        AVERAGE('Sales Data Dump'[avgOrderFrequency]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00"
    )

    -- ── Value field 7: RGB 
    --    Aggregation : SUM
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: rgbOrderQty
    VAR _V7_RGB_ = CALCULATE(
        SUM('Sales Data Dump'[rgbOrderQty]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00"
    )

    -- ── Value field 8: PET 
    --    Aggregation : SUM
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: petOrderQty
    VAR _V8_PET_ = CALCULATE(
        SUM('Sales Data Dump'[petOrderQty]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00"
    )

    -- ── Value field 9: TOTAL ORDER
    --    Aggregation : SUM
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: totalOrderQty
    VAR _V9_TOTAL_ORDER = CALCULATE(
        SUM('Sales Data Dump'[totalOrderQty]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00"
    )

    -- ── Value field 10: SALE COUNT
    --    Aggregation : SUM
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: deliveryCount
    VAR _V10_SALE_COUNT = CALCULATE(
        SUM('Sales Data Dump'[deliveryCount]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00"
    )

    -- ── Value field 11: LAST SALE DAYS
    --    Aggregation : AVERAGE
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: daysSinceLastDelivery
    VAR _V11_LAST_SALE_DAYS = CALCULATE(
        AVERAGE('Sales Data Dump'[daysSinceLastDelivery]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00"
    )

    -- ── Value field 12: DROP       SIZE
    --    Aggregation : AVERAGE
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: avgDeliveryDropSize
    VAR _V12_DROP_______SIZE = CALCULATE(
        AVERAGE('Sales Data Dump'[avgDeliveryDropSize]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00"
    )

    -- ── Value field 13: FREQ DAYS
    --    Aggregation : AVERAGE
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: avgSalesFrequency
    VAR _V13_FREQ_DAYS = CALCULATE(
        AVERAGE('Sales Data Dump'[avgSalesFrequency]),

    -- ── Value field 14: RGB

    --    Source field: rgbDeliveredQty
    VAR _V14_RGB = CALCULATE(

    -- ── Value field 15: PET

    --    Source field: petDeliveredQty
    VAR _V15_PET = CALCULATE(
        SUM('Sales Data Dump'[petDeliveredQty]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00"
    )

    -- ── Value field 16: TOTAL    SALE
    --    Aggregation : SUM
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: totalDeliveredQty
    VAR _V16_TOTAL____SALE = CALCULATE(
        SUM('Sales Data Dump'[totalDeliveredQty]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00"
    )

    -- ── Value field 17:   OTIF %
    --    Aggregation : SUM
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Formula     : totalDeliveredQty/totalOrderQty
    --    Format      : 0%
    --    Source field:  OTIF %
    -- Calculated field original Excel formula: totalDeliveredQty/totalOrderQty
    VAR _V17___OTIF__ = CALCULATE(

    -- ── Value field 18:  RGB Contr. %

-- ========================================================================
-- PIVOT  : Urban outlet grading  [PT_Urban_outlet_grading_5]
-- Sheet  : Urban outlet grading   Location: A7:Z17
-- Source : 'None' ! None
-- Rows   : ['region', 'areaType', 'Customer Grade Categorization', 'routeDescription', 'storeName']
-- Columns: []
-- Filters: ['Month=2025-07-01T00:00:00', 'OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS=0.0', 'Active Route Status(all)', 'operation(all)', 'block(all)']
-- Values : ['OUTLETS', 'VISITS', 'VISIT FREQ DAYS', 'LAST VISIT DAYS', ' LAST ORDER DAYS ', 'ORDER FREQ', 'RGB ', 'PET ', 'TOTAL ORDER', 'SALE COUNT', 'LAST SALE DAYS', 'DROP       SIZE', 'FREQ DAYS', 'RGB', 'PET', 'TOTAL    SALE', '  OTIF %', ' RGB Contr. % ', ' TIER 1 ', '  TIER 2 ', ' OB ', 'TIER 1', 'TIER 2', 'OB', ' ND %']
--
-- Calculated Fields (Excel formula → DAX translation):
--   Excel :   OTIF % = totalDeliveredQty/totalOrderQty
--   DAX   : 'Sales Data Dump'[totalDeliveredQty]/'Sales Data Dump'[totalOrderQty]
--   Excel :  RGB Contr. %  = rgbDeliveredQty/totalDeliveredQty
--   DAX   : 'Sales Data Dump'[rgbDeliveredQty]/'Sales Data Dump'[totalDeliveredQty]
-- ========================================================================

DEFINE

    -- ── Value field 1: OUTLETS
    --    Aggregation : COUNT
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: storeCode
    VAR _V1_OUTLETS = CALCULATE(
        COUNTA('Sales Data Dump'[storeCode]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00",
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0
    )

    -- ── Value field 2: VISITS
    --    Aggregation : SUM
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: mdrDscrVisits
    VAR _V2_VISITS = CALCULATE(
        SUM('Sales Data Dump'[mdrDscrVisits]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00",
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0
    )

    -- ── Value field 3: VISIT FREQ DAYS
    --    Aggregation : AVERAGE
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: avgVisitFrequency
    VAR _V3_VISIT_FREQ_DAYS = CALCULATE(
        AVERAGE('Sales Data Dump'[avgVisitFrequency]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00",
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0
    )

    -- ── Value field 4: LAST VISIT DAYS
    --    Aggregation : AVERAGE
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: daysSinceLastVisit
    VAR _V4_LAST_VISIT_DAYS = CALCULATE(
        AVERAGE('Sales Data Dump'[daysSinceLastVisit]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00",
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0
    )

    -- ── Value field 5:  LAST ORDER DAYS 
    --    Aggregation : AVERAGE
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: daysSinceLastOrder
    VAR _V5__LAST_ORDER_DAYS_ = CALCULATE(
        AVERAGE('Sales Data Dump'[daysSinceLastOrder]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00",
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0
    )

    -- ── Value field 6: ORDER FREQ
    --    Aggregation : AVERAGE
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: avgOrderFrequency
    VAR _V6_ORDER_FREQ = CALCULATE(
        AVERAGE('Sales Data Dump'[avgOrderFrequency]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00",
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0
    )

    -- ── Value field 7: RGB 
    --    Aggregation : SUM
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: rgbOrderQty
    VAR _V7_RGB_ = CALCULATE(
        SUM('Sales Data Dump'[rgbOrderQty]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00",
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0
    )

    -- ── Value field 8: PET 
    --    Aggregation : SUM
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: petOrderQty
    VAR _V8_PET_ = CALCULATE(
        SUM('Sales Data Dump'[petOrderQty]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00",
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0

    -- ── Value field 9: TOTAL ORDER
    --    Aggregation : SUM
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: totalOrderQty
    VAR _V9_TOTAL_ORDER = CALCULATE(
        SUM('Sales Data Dump'[totalOrderQty]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00",
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0

    -- ── Value field 10: SALE COUNT
    --    Aggregation : SUM
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: deliveryCount
    VAR _V10_SALE_COUNT = CALCULATE(
        SUM('Sales Data Dump'[deliveryCount]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00",
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0
    )

    -- ── Value field 11: LAST SALE DAYS
    --    Aggregation : AVERAGE
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: daysSinceLastDelivery
    VAR _V11_LAST_SALE_DAYS = CALCULATE(
        AVERAGE('Sales Data Dump'[daysSinceLastDelivery]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00",

    -- ── Value field 12: DROP       SIZE
    --    Aggregation : AVERAGE
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: avgDeliveryDropSize
    VAR _V12_DROP_______SIZE = CALCULATE(
        AVERAGE('Sales Data Dump'[avgDeliveryDropSize]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00",
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0
    )

    -- ── Value field 13: FREQ DAYS
    --    Aggregation : AVERAGE
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: avgSalesFrequency
    VAR _V13_FREQ_DAYS = CALCULATE(
        AVERAGE('Sales Data Dump'[avgSalesFrequency]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00",
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0

    --    Source field: rgbDeliveredQty
    VAR _V14_RGB = CALCULATE(

    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: petDeliveredQty
    VAR _V15_PET = CALCULATE(
        SUM('Sales Data Dump'[petDeliveredQty]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00",
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0
    )

    -- ── Value field 16: TOTAL    SALE
    --    Aggregation : SUM
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: totalDeliveredQty
    VAR _V16_TOTAL____SALE = CALCULATE(
        SUM('Sales Data Dump'[totalDeliveredQty]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00",
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0
    )

    -- ── Value field 17:   OTIF %
    --    Aggregation : SUM
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Formula     : totalDeliveredQty/totalOrderQty
    --    Format      : 0%
    --    Source field:  OTIF %
    -- Calculated field original Excel formula: totalDeliveredQty/totalOrderQty
    VAR _V17___OTIF__ = CALCULATE(
        'Sales Data Dump'[totalDeliveredQty]/'Sales Data Dump'[totalOrderQty],
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00",
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0
    )

    -- ── Value field 18:  RGB Contr. % 
    --    Aggregation : SUM
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Formula     : rgbDeliveredQty/totalDeliveredQty
    --    Format      : 0%
    --    Source field: RGB Contribution %
    -- Calculated field original Excel formula: rgbDeliveredQty/totalDeliveredQty
    VAR _V18__RGB_Contr____ = CALCULATE(
        'Sales Data Dump'[rgbDeliveredQty]/'Sales Data Dump'[totalDeliveredQty],
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00",
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0
    )

    -- ── Value field 19:  TIER 1 
    --    Aggregation : SUM
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: Tier 1 SALES
    VAR _V19__TIER_1_ = CALCULATE(
        SUM('Sales Data Dump'[Tier 1 SALES]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00",

    --    Aggregation : SUM
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value

    VAR _V20___TIER_2_ = CALCULATE(

    -- ── Value field 21:  OB 
    --    Aggregation : SUM
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value

    VAR _V21__OB_ = CALCULATE(

    --    Aggregation : AVERAGE
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : 0%
    --    Source field: Tier 2 ND
    VAR _V23_TIER_2 = CALCULATE(
        AVERAGE('Sales Data Dump'[Tier 2 ND]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00",
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0
    )

    -- ── Value field 24: OB
    --    Aggregation : AVERAGE
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : 0%
    --    Source field: Tier OB ND
    VAR _V24_OB = CALCULATE(
        AVERAGE('Sales Data Dump'[Tier OB ND]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00",

    VAR _V25__ND__ = CALCULATE(

        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00",
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0

EVALUATE

SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
    -- Note: items hidden in this field: ['Mbeya', 'Arusha', 'Mwanza', 'Morogoro', 'Dummy']

-- ========================================================================
-- PIVOT  : BLOCK ROUTE SALES  [PT_BLOCK_ROUTE_SALES_17]
-- Sheet  : BLOCK ROUTE SALES   Location: C7:U30
-- Source : 'None' ! None
-- Rows   : ['region', 'areaType', 'block', 'routeDescription', 'storeName']
-- Columns: []
-- Filters: ['OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS=0.0', 'operation(all)', 'Active Route Status(all)', 'Month=2025-07-01T00:00:00']
-- Values : ['OUTLETS', 'VISITS', 'FREQ DAYS', 'LAST VISIT DAYS', 'LAST SALE DAYS', 'SALE COUNT', 'RGB', 'PET', 'TOTAL', ' RGB Contr  %', 'DROP SIZE', ' TIER 1 ', '  TIER 2 ', ' OB ', 'TIER 1', 'TIER 2', 'OB', ' ND %']
--
-- Calculated Fields (Excel formula → DAX translation):
--   Excel :  RGB Contr  % = rgbDeliveredQty/totalDeliveredQty
--   DAX   : 'Sales Data Dump'[rgbDeliveredQty]/'Sales Data Dump'[totalDeliveredQty]
-- ========================================================================

DEFINE

    -- ── Value field 1: OUTLETS
    --    Aggregation : COUNT
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: storeCode
    VAR _V1_OUTLETS = CALCULATE(
        COUNTA('Sales Data Dump'[storeCode]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0,
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00"
    )

    -- ── Value field 2: VISITS
    --    Aggregation : SUM
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: mdrDscrVisits
    VAR _V2_VISITS = CALCULATE(
        SUM('Sales Data Dump'[mdrDscrVisits]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0,
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00"
    )

    -- ── Value field 3: FREQ DAYS
    --    Aggregation : AVERAGE
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: avgVisitFrequency
    VAR _V3_FREQ_DAYS = CALCULATE(
        AVERAGE('Sales Data Dump'[avgVisitFrequency]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0,
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00"
    )

    -- ── Value field 4: LAST VISIT DAYS
    --    Aggregation : AVERAGE
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: daysSinceLastVisit
    VAR _V4_LAST_VISIT_DAYS = CALCULATE(
        AVERAGE('Sales Data Dump'[daysSinceLastVisit]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0,
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00"
    )

    -- ── Value field 5: LAST SALE DAYS
    --    Aggregation : AVERAGE
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: daysSinceLastDelivery
    VAR _V5_LAST_SALE_DAYS = CALCULATE(
        AVERAGE('Sales Data Dump'[daysSinceLastDelivery]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0,
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00"
    )

    -- ── Value field 6: SALE COUNT
    --    Aggregation : SUM
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: deliveryCount
    VAR _V6_SALE_COUNT = CALCULATE(
        SUM('Sales Data Dump'[deliveryCount]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0,
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00"
    )

    -- ── Value field 7: RGB
    --    Aggregation : SUM
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: rgbDeliveredQty
    VAR _V7_RGB = CALCULATE(
        SUM('Sales Data Dump'[rgbDeliveredQty]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0,
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00"
    )

    -- ── Value field 8: PET
    --    Aggregation : SUM
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: petDeliveredQty
    VAR _V8_PET = CALCULATE(
        SUM('Sales Data Dump'[petDeliveredQty]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0,
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00"
    )

    -- ── Value field 9: TOTAL
    --    Aggregation : SUM
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: totalDeliveredQty
    VAR _V9_TOTAL = CALCULATE(
        SUM('Sales Data Dump'[totalDeliveredQty]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0,
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00"
    )

    -- ── Value field 10:  RGB Contr  %
    --    Aggregation : SUM
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Formula     : rgbDeliveredQty/totalDeliveredQty
    --    Format      : 0%
    --    Source field: RGB Contribution %
    -- Calculated field original Excel formula: rgbDeliveredQty/totalDeliveredQty
    VAR _V10__RGB_Contr___ = CALCULATE(
        'Sales Data Dump'[rgbDeliveredQty]/'Sales Data Dump'[totalDeliveredQty],
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0,
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00"
    )

    -- ── Value field 11: DROP SIZE
    --    Aggregation : AVERAGE
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: avgDeliveryDropSize
    VAR _V11_DROP_SIZE = CALCULATE(
        AVERAGE('Sales Data Dump'[avgDeliveryDropSize]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0,
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00"
    )

    -- ── Value field 12:  TIER 1 
    --    Aggregation : SUM
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: Tier 1 SALES
    VAR _V12__TIER_1_ = CALCULATE(
        SUM('Sales Data Dump'[Tier 1 SALES]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0,
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00"
    )

    -- ── Value field 13:   TIER 2 
    --    Aggregation : SUM
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: Tier 2 Sales
    VAR _V13___TIER_2_ = CALCULATE(
        SUM('Sales Data Dump'[Tier 2 Sales]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0,
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00"
    )

    -- ── Value field 14:  OB 
    --    Aggregation : SUM
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : #,##0
    --    Source field: Tier OB Sales
    VAR _V14__OB_ = CALCULATE(
        SUM('Sales Data Dump'[Tier OB Sales]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0,
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00"
    )

    -- ── Value field 15: TIER 1
    --    Aggregation : AVERAGE
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : 0%
    --    Source field: Tier 1 ND
    VAR _V15_TIER_1 = CALCULATE(
        AVERAGE('Sales Data Dump'[Tier 1 ND]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0,
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00"
    )

    -- ── Value field 16: TIER 2
    --    Aggregation : AVERAGE
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : 0%
    --    Source field: Tier 2 ND
    VAR _V16_TIER_2 = CALCULATE(
        AVERAGE('Sales Data Dump'[Tier 2 ND]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0,
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00"
    )

    -- ── Value field 17: OB
    --    Aggregation : AVERAGE
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : 0%
    --    Source field: Tier OB ND
    VAR _V17_OB = CALCULATE(
        AVERAGE('Sales Data Dump'[Tier OB ND]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0,
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00"
    )

    -- ── Value field 18:  ND %
    --    Aggregation : AVERAGE
    --    ShowDataAs  : Raw value
    --    Format      : 0%
    --    Source field: Total ND
    VAR _V18__ND__ = CALCULATE(
        AVERAGE('Sales Data Dump'[Total ND]),
        'Sales Data Dump'[OUTLET SYSTEM ACTIVE STATUS] = 0.0,
        'Sales Data Dump'[Month] = "2025-07-01T00:00:00"
    )

EVALUATE
